title: DMSO and Compound Stock Solution Addition - Part 2
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol serially diluted compound stock with DMSO. For detailed protocol steps, please see below. Note: if n < 15, use NEST PCR plates, and if n > 15, use deep well plates.
steps_raw: This protocol serially diluted compound stock with DMSO. For detailed protocol steps, please see below. Note: if n < 15, use NEST PCR plates, and if n > 15, use deep well plates.
Transfer 2.4 uL * n from DMSO reservoir to columns 2-12 in Dilution Plates DMSO 1-1, keep tips
Transfer 2.4 uL * n from DMSO reservoir to all wells in Dilution Plates DMSO 1-2, discard tips
Transfer 7.2 uL * n from column 1 of Compound Stocks to column 1 of Dilution Plate DMSO 1-1, keep tips

Transfer 4.8 uL * n from column 1 of Dilution plate DMSO 1-1 to column 2, mixing after. Repeat process, transferring from 2-3 3-4 4-5 etc mixing after each time, until transferring from 10-11 (skip 12), keep tips
Transfer 4.8 uL * n from column 11 of Dilution plate DMSO 1-1 to column 1 of Dilution Plate DMSO 1-2, mixing after, keep tips.

Transfer 4.8 uL * n  from column 1 of Dilution plate DMSO 1-2 to column 2, mixing after. Repeat process, transferring from 2-3 3-4 4-5 etc mixing after each time, until transferring from 10-11 (skip 12), discard tips
materials_raw: NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt #402501
